channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 2 potholes on either side of the road, 30th June
item.description:
2 holes. One on each side. Unavoidable and getting bigger as you exit the wooded area. What3Words: cold.handyman.daredevil
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A436, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 30th June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 30th June
item.description:

item.title: Loose and uneven kerb. Possible trip hazard., 30th June
item.description:
Outside No34 Dinglewell Hucclecote
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dinglewell, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 30th June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days plus temporary footway closure footway aburt level difference ramp up over tree roots 4000x2200x25 mm stats required stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 30th June
item.description:
Give and take temporary footway closure 28 day please cut back overgrown tree growth approx 4000x3000 meters from footway/carriage way (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet
